title: Your First Place to Stay
scenario: Your first salary just landed. A private 1BHK near the office costs a lot more than a shared flat 40 minutes away. Where do you move in?

choices.label: Rent a solo 1BHK near work
choices.lesson: Housing is usually a first earner's biggest cost. Locking in high rent early raises your baseline spending for every future month.

choices.label: Share a flat further out
choices.lesson: Keeping rent near 25-30% of take-home pay frees up money to save and invest while your income is still small.
